title: Mod Manager By OrigamiKing3612
description: A Mod, Resource Pack, and Shader Manager for Minecraft
body:
# I am kinda done with modding so this mod is archived. I may get back to it one day.

# Mod-Manager
A not-so-pretty (for now) Mod-Manager for Minecraft. 

### **This mod is in alpha there will be bugs**

If you would like to help, open an issue or pull request [here](https://github.com/OrigamiKing3612/Mod-Manager).

This mod has:
1. A browsing page for mods, resource packs, shaders, and data packs

This mod will:
1. Have a mod and possibly resource and data pack updater
